name: scenario1_device_name
description: The candidate joins under a device-style display name ('MacBook Pro') instead of their real name. Identity from the display name is useless, so the verdict must lean on behaviour: a self-introduction with the expected name, answering (not asking) questions, and substantial speaking time.

events.text: Hi, thanks for joining. Can you tell me about yourself?
Hi, my name is Rahul Sharma, I'm a backend engineer.
Great. Could you walk me through a recent project?
Sure. I built a real-time detection service using FastAPI and asyncio.
I focused on fusing multiple weak signals so it stays robust under bad data.
